problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: Combining Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
